watches.name: SBGX261 "HAQ" Black Dial
watches.description: The SBGX261 is the quartz purist's Grand Seiko: a 37mm case with Zaratsu-polished surfaces, the legendary 9F62 thermo-compensated quartz movement, and a deep inky-black dial.
watches.disclosure: Full AD kit. Sized but unworn. Stickers on caseback.
watches.inquirySubject: Inquiry: GRAND SEIKO SBGX261 HAQ Black Dial
watches.inquiryBody: Hi Watch Alley, I'm interested in the Grand Seiko SBGX261 HAQ Black Dial (PHP 68,500). Could you confirm current availability, condition photos, and full set details?

watches.name: Black Bay 58 Gilt
watches.description: The Tudor Black Bay 58 needs little introduction: the sweet-spot diver at 39mm with the in-house MT5402 COSC-certified movement. Gilt dial, rivet bracelet, 200m water resistance.
watches.disclosure: Light desk-diving marks on clasp. Crystal and bezel clean.
watches.inquiryBody: Hi Watch Alley, I'm interested in the Tudor Black Bay 58 Gilt (PHP 145,000). Could you confirm current availability, condition photos, and set inclusions?

watches.name: SPB143 "62MAS" Reissue
watches.description: The SPB143 is widely regarded as one of the strongest value divers under 50k PHP. A faithful modern reissue of the 62MAS with 70-hour power reserve and sapphire crystal.
watches.disclosure: Minimal bracelet wear. Crystal and bezel perfect.
watches.inquiryBody: Hi Watch Alley, I'm interested in the Seiko Prospex SPB143 62MAS Reissue (PHP 42,000). Could you confirm current availability, condition photos, and set inclusions?

watches.name: Alpinist SPB491J1 "Whiskered Pitta"
watches.description: The SPB491J1 is a Philippine-exclusive Prospex Alpinist limited to 500 pieces, nicknamed "Whiskered Pitta" after the endemic bird. Deep forest green dial with gold accents, 6R35 movement, and 200m water resistance.
watches.disclosure: Full AD set. Stickers still on caseback.
watches.provenance: Purchased from Seiko AD, Metro Manila.
watches.inquirySubject: Inquiry: SEIKO PROSPEX Alpinist Whiskered Pitta SPB491J1
watches.inquiryBody: Hi Watch Alley, I'm interested in the Seiko Prospex Alpinist Whiskered Pitta SPB491J1 (PHP 54,000). Could you confirm availability, full set details, and warranty status?

watches.name: 5 Sports SRPD55K1 "5KX"
watches.description: The SRPD55K1, the "5KX", is the entry-level dive-style watch that started thousands of collections. 4R36 automatic with hacking, 100m water resistance, and the familiar SKX-derived case.
watches.disclosure: Used regularly. Bezel scuffs at 12/6. Crystal clean.
watches.inquiryBody: Hi Watch Alley, I'm interested in the Seiko 5 Sports SRPD55K1 5KX (PHP 9,500). Could you confirm current availability, condition photos, and inclusions?

watches.name: MoonSwatch - Mission to Mars
